Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution.
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Continued To Mar-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patrick Kerwin for Melissa Pederson.

Mr. Kerwin stated that he received the final inventory from the Referee on Friday and that he is now in a position to prepare a petition for final distribution. Status on filing of an inventory and appraisal, and petition for final distribution is continued to March 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-30-2017 Continued To Sep-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on September 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, and why an Inventory and Appraisal and a Petition for Final Distribution have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
